g.text: +Incident(hazardType : HazardType, gpsLocation : GpsCoordinate, description : String, victimCount : int)
+TestRunReport(testsRun : long, passed : long, failed : long, durationMs : long, failureSummaries : List<String>)
Eight stub agencies realise this interface in the prototype, each with a
fixed name and unit count - all of Assessment One's NFR-O04 named partners.
IPartnerAgency remains the open-closed extension point: adding a ninth
agency is a single new class implementing IPartnerAgency and registering it
with PartnerNotifier; the notifier itself does not change.
id means the Responder is available.
